name: Blender Action: Export USD
description: Creates a Blender action to export scene as Universal Scene Description (USD/USDA/USDC) using bpy.ops.wm.usd_export. Supports animation, hair, UVs, normals, and materials.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    usd_path = inputs.get('usd_path') or self.get_parameter('usd_path', '')

    def _get_bool(key, default):
        v = inputs.get(key)
        return bool(v if v is not None else self.get_parameter(key, default))

    action = {
        'type': 'export_usd',
        'usd_path': usd_path,
        'export_animation': _get_bool('export_animation', False),
        'export_hair': _get_bool('export_hair', False),
        'export_uvmaps': _get_bool('export_uvmaps', True),
        'export_normals': _get_bool('export_normals', True),
        'export_materials': _get_bool('export_materials', True),
    }
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_usd action -> {usd_path}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
